_doc: EXPLICIT, FAIL-CLOSED RELEASE-METADATA CONTRACT for the club-valuation overlay's pick curve (ui/tools/ingest_inputs.py). The accepted release configuration (data/model_config.json) pins RL_PVCADOPT=1 but does NOT carry RL_PVC2 — RL_PVC2 is an engine default-ON kill-switch (config UNMOVED, see data/expected_boot.json _legd_act2_note), so the release-active pick-curve pathway cannot be read from the config alone. This contract declares it explicitly. ingest_inputs.py resolves the release-active pick curve DETERMINISTICALLY from this file, cross-checks it against the accepted release (store + release_version from data/expected_boot.json) and the engine curve file's own self-declared gate/identity, and cross-checks the installed board's PVC against the resolved curve. Missing, unknown, or conflicting selection HALTs (never guesses). It recomputes NO value: a pick price is a mean over the resolved engine curve; player values are the stamped board 'v'. Do not hand-edit outside a release pick-curve change.

supersedes.note: The prior v2.9 L1b adopt curve. RL_PVC2 (default ON) supersedes it and loads pvc_curve_v2.json into _PVC0; RL_PVC2=0 would fall back to L1b (board 9829d01a). Recorded so a stale-L1b overlay fails closed instead of silently pricing on the superseded curve.
